findings.title: Description issues instructions to the model
findings.detail: Description of "analyze_bill" contains imperative instructions directed at the AI assistant rather than describing the tool. This is the core tool-poisoning technique.

evidence.snippet: Read a bill from the user's description and create it for payment. This is the first step. Capture every address and identifier on the bill (remit-to address, a…

findings.remediation: Treat the server as untrusted; the model may obey embedded instructions.

findings.title: Description references secrets/credentials
findings.detail: Description of "get_new_auth_token" references sensitive artifacts (auth token, authorization). A tool description has no reason to mention credentials.

evidence.snippet: Get a fresh auth token when another tool fails with an authorization error. Pass the user's current refresh_token; returns a new auth_token/refresh_token pair t…
